summary: Iteration 19: Post-Audit Refactor Testing - All backend endpoints pass (9/9 tests). Frontend pages render correctly: AnimaVM page with all 7 monitor tabs, Configuration page with Engine/Constitution tabs. SSE hook and SSEProvider working correctly. No duplicate EventSource issues detected.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimaVM.js correctly uses useSSE() and useSSETrigger() from shared SSEProvider - no duplicate EventSource
Configuration.js correctly uses useSSETrigger for data fetching - SSE-driven updates working
AgentSetup.js correctly uses useSSETrigger (fallbackMs: 10000) - refactored properly
useSSE.js provides single shared EventSource via React Context - prevents duplicate connections
useSSETrigger provides fallback polling when SSE is disconnected
SSE stream /api/live/stream returns complete payload with all required fields
/api/credits/verify endpoint correctly returns verified: true/false and message
/api/credits/history returns purchases and verifications arrays for audit trail
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the post-audit refactor changes. Key refactors confirmed: (1) AnimaVM uses shared SSEProvider via useSSE()+useSSETrigger() instead of duplicate EventSource, (2) Configuration uses useSSETrigger, (3) AgentSetup uses useSSETrigger. All credits endpoints (/balance, /verify, /history) working correctly. SSE stream at /api/live/stream pushes real-time data. Note: AgentSetup.js exists but is not routed in App.js - Infrastructure.js is the active page for infra tab.
backend_apis_tested: GET /api/live/stream - 200 OK (SSE text/event-stream with JSON data)
